L. 95–83, title I, § 106(r)91 Stat. 385Pub. L. 96–79, title II, § 202(a)93 Stat. 632Jan. 4, 1975Aug. 1, 1977Oct. 4, 1979
Section 300 related to statement of purpose.o
Section 300–1 provided for promulgation of regulations and required provisions.o

Section 300–2 related to State medical facilities plans, submission and approval of plans as prerequisite for approval of project assistance applications, required provisions, and procedure upon disapproval of plans.o

Section 300–3 provided for medical facility project applications, covering in submission of applications, required provisions, waivers, and projects subject to requirements, criteria for approval, procedure for disapproval, amendment of approved applications, and review by health systems agencies.o
